roadmap:
0. Foundation: event-storming → ubiquitous-language (define user actions, offline states, and notification events as domain vocabulary)
1. Scaffold with service worker + manifest
2. App shell architecture
3. Caching strategy (network-first, cache-first, stale-while-revalidate)
4. Offline fallback
5. Push notifications (optional)
6. Lighthouse audit + optimization
7. Deploy
